candidates.why: Canonical public Agent Skills examples and packaging patterns.
candidates.intake: Reference first; import only small patterns that pass local validation.

candidates.why: OpenClaw public skill and plugin registry with search, stars, comments, pinning, and CLI flows.
candidates.intake: Use as a live discovery source during capability gaps; inspect before installing.

candidates.why: Cross-agent Skills CLI supporting Codex, Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes-style paths, search, list, use, add, and update.
candidates.intake: Use `npx skills find` for discovery and `npx skills add --list` for inspection; install only after approval.

candidates.why: Curated index for Claude Code skills, hooks, commands, MCP servers, and workflows.
candidates.intake: Use as a search index when a runtime capability gap appears.

candidates.why: Broad toolkit layout with skills, commands, hooks, agents, MCP configs, and plugins.
candidates.intake: Evaluate individual skills; do not install the whole bundle blindly.

candidates.why: Production engineering oriented skill examples for code review, testing, frontend, and web quality.
candidates.intake: Compare against existing local review skills before import.

candidates.why: Security-focused vibe coding skill candidate for threat modeling and secure implementation review.
candidates.intake: Use for security gaps after checking license, freshness, and overlap with local security skills.

candidates.why: Security research and vulnerability detection skills from Trail of Bits.
candidates.intake: Strong security candidate; verify license fit and import narrowly for audit workflows.

candidates.why: Safety hook pattern for dangerous command interception in Claude-style environments.
candidates.intake: Adapt host-specific hooks only after confirming target host hook semantics.

candidates.why: Treats skills as reusable infrastructure across multiple agent hosts.
candidates.intake: Reference for multi-host packaging and skill lifecycle patterns.

candidates.why: Spec and memory oriented vibe coding kit candidate.
candidates.intake: Evaluate only if current local planning and memory skills do not cover the workflow.

candidates.why: Large skill catalog useful for discovery across specialized tasks.
candidates.intake: Use as a catalog; import narrowly after user approval.
